s: Catalogue your wardrobe and browse it with a full-screen swipe feed
d:
maCat is a simple personal catalogue for clothes, shoes and jewellery.
Photograph each item and browse your wardrobe full-screen, one item at a
time, with a vertical swipe feed like short-video apps.

Features:

* Add items one at a time with the in-app camera or from the gallery
* Bulk add: photograph everything first, then name each item
* Organise and filter by category: clothes, shoes, jewellery
* Looping full-screen feed plus a grid overview for jumping around
* Edit and delete items
* Adaptive layout for phones and foldables
* Everything stays on the device: no accounts, no network access, no tracking
